description: A complete proposal data dict (all 19 required fields incl. the six HTML blocks and a non-empty PRICING_LINES) passes field-presence validation.

data.SUBJECT: ODUN.ONE deep packet intelligence - commercial proposal
data.LEDE: A sovereign DPI+ platform proposal for Northwind Systems.
data.EXECUTIVE_OPENING_HTML: Thank you for the productive sessions on sovereign traffic intelligence.
data.OPPORTUNITY_HTML: Northwind needs line-rate classification without decryption across its national backbone.
data.SOLUTION_HTML: ODUN.ONE delivers DPI+ classification on commodity hardware, fully on-premise.
data.PROOF_HTML: Three sovereign operators run ODUN.ONE in production today.
data.COMMERCIAL_INTRO_HTML: The commercial structure below is modular and activation-based.
data.NEXT_STEPS_HTML: We propose a Proof of Value within 30 days of signature.
